title: Definitions in the Code to be understood subject to exceptions
content: Throughout this Code every definition of an offence, every penal provision and every illustration of every such definition or penal provision, shall be understood subject to the exceptions contained in the chapter entitled 'General Exceptions,' though those exceptions are not repeated in such definition, penal provision or illustration.

illumination_lamp.scenario: A child under seven years of age commits an act that would otherwise be an offence.
illumination_lamp.legal_effect: Even though the definition of the offence does not explicitly state it, the act is not an offence because it is understood subject to the General Exception for children under seven.

title: Sense of expression once explained
content: Every expression which is explained in any part of this Code is used in every part of this Code in conformity with the explanation.

title: Gender
content: The pronoun 'he' and its derivatives are used of any person, whether male or female.

title: Number
content: Unless the contrary appears from the context, words importing the singular number include the plural number.

title: Man, Woman
content: The word 'man' denotes a male human being of any age; the word 'woman' denotes a female human being of any age.

title: Person
content: The word 'person' includes any Company or Association or body of persons, whether incorporated or not.

title: Public
content: The word 'public' includes any class of the public or any community.

title: Definition of Queen
content: [Repealed by the Federal Laws (Revision and Declaration) Ordinance, 1981].

footnotes.text: Repealed as redundant following the establishment of the Republic.

title: Servant of the State
content: The words 'servant of the State' denote any officer or servant continued, appointed or employed in Pakistan.

title: Definition of British India
content: [Repealed by the Federal Laws (Revision and Declaration) Ordinance, 1981].

title: Definition of Government of India
content: [Repealed by the Federal Laws (Revision and Declaration) Ordinance, 1981].

title: Government
content: The word 'Government' denotes the Federal Government or the Provincial Government.

title: India
content: [Omitted by the Federal Laws (Revision and Declaration) Ordinance, 1981].

title: Judge
content: The word 'Judge' denotes not only every person who is officially designated as a Judge, but also every person who is empowered by law to give a definitive judgment.

title: Court of Justice
content: The words 'Court of Justice' denote a Judge who is empowered by law to act judicially alone.

title: Public servant
content: The words 'public servant' denote a person falling under various specific legal descriptions.

title: Moveable property
content: Corporeal property of every description, except land and things attached to the earth.

title: Wrongful gain / loss
content: Gain or loss by unlawful means of property to which one is not entitled.

title: Dishonestly
content: Intention of causing wrongful gain or loss.

title: Fraudulently
content: Intent to defraud but not otherwise.

title: Reason to believe
content: Sufficient cause to believe that thing.

title: Property in possession of wife, clerk or servant
content: Possession by agent on account of a person is possession of that person.

title: Counterfeit
content: Causing resemblance to practice deception.

title: Document
content: Any matter expressed upon any substance by means of letters or marks.

title: Valuable security
content: A document whereby any legal right is created or extinguished.

title: A will
content: Any testamentary document.

title: Acts include illegal omissions
content: Reference to acts includes illegal omissions.

title: Act, Omission
content: An act denotes a series of acts; an omission denotes a series of omissions.

title: Acts done by several persons in furtherance of common intention
content: When a criminal act is done by several persons in furtherance of common intention, each is liable.

title: Criminal act by criminal knowledge or intention
content: Joint liability where act is criminal by reason of knowledge.

title: Effect caused partly by act and partly by omission
content: Liability for combined act and omission.

title: Co-operation in offence
content: Liability for co-operation.

title: Persons concerned in criminal act
content: Persons may be guilty of different offences.

title: Voluntarily
content: Causing effect by means which were intended.

title: Offence
content: Thing punishable by Code.

title: Special law
content: Law applicable to a particular subject.

title: Local law
content: Law applicable to a particular part of Pakistan.

title: Illegal, Legally bound to do
content: Everything which is an offence or prohibited by law.

title: Injury
content: Harm to body, mind, reputation or property.

title: Life
content: Life of a human being.

title: Death
content: Death of a human being.

title: Animal
content: Any living creature other than a human being.

title: Vessel
content: Anything made for the conveyance of human beings.

title: Year, Month
content: Year or month reckoned according to the British calendar.

title: Section
content: Section of the Code.

title: Oath
content: Affirmation substituted by law for an oath.

title: Good faith
content: Nothing is said to be done in 'good faith' which is done without due care and attention.
